matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $svc = Get-Service -Name ClusSvc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $status = if ($svc) { $svc.Status.ToString() } else { '' }; $startType = if ($svc) { $svc.StartType.ToString() } else { '' }; [pscustomobject]@{ service_exists = [bool]$svc; service_status = $status; service_start_type = $startType } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
